_comment: Critical lab value thresholds for Lotto Central Hospital. Based on standard clinical reference ranges adapted for Nigerian clinical practice.

rules.name: critical-high-potassium
rules.actionLow: Risk of cardiac arrhythmia — replace immediately
rules.actionHigh: Risk of fatal arrhythmia — treat immediately, repeat ECG

rules.name: critical-sodium
rules.actionLow: Severe hyponatremia — risk of cerebral oedema
rules.actionHigh: Severe hypernatremia — risk of neurological damage

rules.name: critical-troponin-t
rules.actionHigh: Elevated troponin — evaluate for acute MI, notify cardiologist

rules.name: critical-troponin-i
rules.actionHigh: Elevated troponin — evaluate for acute MI, notify cardiologist

rules.name: critical-creatinine
rules.actionHigh: Severe renal impairment — evaluate for acute kidney injury

rules.name: critical-platelets
rules.actionLow: Severe thrombocytopenia — risk of spontaneous bleeding

rules.name: critical-wbc
rules.actionHigh: Severe leukocytosis — evaluate for sepsis or haematological malignancy

rules.name: critical-ph
rules.actionLow: Severe acidosis — identify and treat cause
rules.actionHigh: Severe alkalosis — identify and treat cause
